name: Synup Social vs. Post Planner
hero_summary: You deserve an upgrade. While Post Planner got the ball rolling, you need a platform that can handle your growth (AKA, no bugs and a supportive customer service team). From ads to AI, Synup Social will fuel your rise to success. With all the same bells and whistles as Post Planner, it’s the perfect next step for teams looking for a Post Planner alternative.
counter_text_1: say they can effortlessly collaborate with their teams
counter_text_2: of users say they’ve cut their social media management time in half
counter_text_3: average growth in engagement in the first 6 months
section_2_summary: Synup Social empowers you to do more with less. Post Planner’s interface helps you recycle posts, but Synup takes it to the next level. With an intuitive platform, robust analytics, and a seamless post-creation experience, you’ll be creating killer content in no time. Although Post Planner is well-loved by SMBs, Synup Social stands out because of its:
section_2_slider_1_heading: Discover what makes your audience tick
section_2_slider_1_summary: A data-driven strategy gets results. Post Planner’s analytics lack the insights that let you see what’s actually driving your growth. With Synup Social, you can see which posts are your BFFs with interactive engagement graphs. You can even recycle the posts directly from the analytics page. Get ready to grow!
section_2_slider_2_summary: We’re sure you love Post Planner’s post recycler. Let’s take it up a notch! Synup Social helps you revive your best posts, explore industry trends, copy your competitors, and more. Take the hassle out of social media management with competitor tracking, trend forecasting, post analytics, and more.
section_2_slider_3_heading: Collaboration is the name of the game
section_2_step_3_summary: Collaboration is key when expanding your team. Whether you’re aligning your team or synchronizing your efforts with clients, Synup Social makes collaboration easy. While Post Planner’s bare-bones approval workflow makes it difficult to work with your team, Synup Social lets team members collaborate on posts together, submit posts to supervisors and clients for approval, and more
section_2_slider_4_summary: Ready to expand? Synup Social grows with your business, whether you’re an agency adding clients or you’re catering to local audiences with location-specific accounts. Post Planner lacks support for multi-account management, impeding your growth. Synup Social makes it simple for brands with multiple locations to manage their social profiles for tens to thousands of locations - all from one platform.
section_4_why_choose_synup_subtitle: PURPOSE BUILT TO PRODUCE RESULTS FOR ALL BUSINESS SIZES
section_4_why_choose_synup_heading: Why you should choose Synup Social over Post Planner?
why_choose_tab_desc_1: We Post For Every Social Platform
why_choose_tab_desc_2: We Help You Generate Ideas & Boost Posts
why_choose_content_summary: Boost your brand presence on social media with our AI-powered platform. Create, publish, and track engagement of your posts all in one place, and go live in just minutes. Results guaranteed 🚀.
testimonial_summary: Social media management teams love Synup Social for its robust analytics, content inspiration, ease of post creation, and streamlined interface. Teams that make the switch to Synup Social benefit from an enhanced collaboration workflow, spending less time creating and editing content and more time engaging with their audience!
customer_review_1_name: Bree M - Director Of Marketing And Community Relations
customer_review_1_summary: I can use their services as a platform to make sure all my business locations are up to date with all the correct information. I don't have to go to all these other sites to change hours when we have a holiday!
customer_review_2_name: Elisa Rose L - Vice President & Founding Member
customer_review_2_summary: Synup is very user friendly and very effective at claiming and updating directory listings for businesses. Reviews requests are also easy to send out and respond to right from the same dashboard.
section_3_summary: Post Planner and Synup Social are both beloved by SMBs for all things social media management. But brands looking to grow should look to Synup Social. Post Planner is great as a starter tool, but it’ll hold you back in the long run. With Synup Social’s data-driven approach to social media management, you’ll be on the right track for long-term growth. Here’s a side-by-side look:
